title: Use pings to communicate intent, not frustration
body: Good jungle pings tell your team what the next play means. A clear danger ping on a lane before the enemy jungler arrives or a direct assist ping on the next objective changes how teammates react. Spam or vague pings often create less value than one or two precise pings tied to the real play.
actionables: Ping the enemy jungler's likely destination before the play starts, not after it is already happening.
Use assist pings to state the objective or move you want your team to commit to.
Review your first two pings before each major enemy action and ask whether they communicated intent or only emotion.

source.title: Give Me 40 Minutes To Make You INSANE At Jungle - Diamond Jungle Coaching
source.notes: Built from Leo's distinction between vague pings and informative pings that tell laners what is about to happen.
